title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods. Services include childbirth education, nurse home visiting, maternal mental health resources and counseling, and information and referral for community resources and infant care supplies. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals needing prenatal or postpartum resources Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Pregnant Individuals Childbirth Education Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
